name: Full Recon Pipeline
description: Complete reconnaissance from subdomain discovery to vulnerability scanning
bash:
#!/bin/bash
# Full Recon Pipeline
# Usage: ./recon.sh target.com

TARGET=$1
OUT="recon_$TARGET"
mkdir -p $OUT

echo "[*] Step 1: Subdomain Enumeration"
subfinder -d $TARGET -all -o $OUT/subs.txt
echo "[+] Found $(wc -l < $OUT/subs.txt) subdomains"

echo "[*] Step 2: DNS Resolution"
cat $OUT/subs.txt | dnsx -silent -a -resp -o $OUT/resolved.txt

echo "[*] Step 3: HTTP Probing"
cat $OUT/subs.txt | httpx -silent -status-code -title -tech-detect -o $OUT/alive.txt

echo "[*] Step 4: Screenshots"
gowitness file -f $OUT/alive.txt -P $OUT/screenshots/

echo "[*] Step 5: Vulnerability Scan"
nuclei -l $OUT/alive.txt -severity critical,high -o $OUT/vulns.txt

echo "[+] Recon complete! Results in $OUT/"
python:
import subprocess
import os
import sys

target = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else 'example.com'
out_dir = f'recon_{target}'
os.makedirs(out_dir, exist_ok=True)

steps = [
    ('Subdomain Enum', f'subfinder -d {target} -all -o {out_dir}/subs.txt'),
    ('DNS Resolution', f'cat {out_dir}/subs.txt | dnsx -silent -a -resp -o {out_dir}/resolved.txt'),
    ('HTTP Probing', f'cat {out_dir}/subs.txt | httpx -silent -status-code -title -o {out_dir}/alive.txt'),
    ('Screenshots', f'gowitness file -f {out_dir}/alive.txt -P {out_dir}/screenshots/'),
    ('Nuclei Scan', f'nuclei -l {out_dir}/alive.txt -severity critical,high -o {out_dir}/vulns.txt'),
]

for name, cmd in steps:
    print(f'[*] {name}')
    subprocess.run(cmd, shell=True)

print(f'[+] Complete! Results: {out_dir}/')

name: XSS Hunter Pipeline
description: Automated XSS discovery across multiple parameters and endpoints
bash:
#!/bin/bash
# XSS Hunter Pipeline
TARGET=$1
OUT="xss_$TARGET"
mkdir -p $OUT

echo "[*] Step 1: URL Collection"
gau $TARGET --threads 5 | sort -u > $OUT/urls.txt
echo "[+] Collected $(wc -l < $OUT/urls.txt) URLs"

echo "[*] Step 2: Parameter Extraction"
cat $OUT/urls.txt | gf xss > $OUT/xss_params.txt

echo "[*] Step 3: Parameter Fuzzing"
cat $OUT/xss_params.txt | qsreplace 'FUZZ' > $OUT/fuzz_urls.txt

echo "[*] Step 4: XSS Testing"
cat $OUT/fuzz_urls.txt | dalfox pipe -o $OUT/xss_results.txt

echo "[*] Step 5: Report"
echo "XSS Scan Report - $TARGET" > $OUT/report.txt
echo "Date: $(date)" >> $OUT/report.txt
echo "Findings:" >> $OUT/report.txt
cat $OUT/xss_results.txt >> $OUT/report.txt

echo "[+] XSS scan complete!"
python:
import subprocess, sys, os

target = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else 'example.com'
out = f'xss_{target}'
os.makedirs(out, exist_ok=True)

print('[*] Collecting URLs...')
subprocess.run(f'gau {target} --threads 5 | sort -u > {out}/urls.txt', shell=True)
print('[*] Extracting XSS parameters...')
subprocess.run(f'cat {out}/urls.txt | gf xss > {out}/xss_params.txt', shell=True)
print('[*] Testing for XSS...')
subprocess.run(f'cat {out}/xss_params.txt | qsreplace FUZZ | dalfox pipe -o {out}/results.txt', shell=True)
print(f'[+] Done! Results: {out}/results.txt')

name: SQLi Discovery Pipeline
description: Automated SQL injection detection across discovered endpoints
bash:
#!/bin/bash
# SQLi Discovery Pipeline
TARGET=$1
OUT="sqli_$TARGET"
mkdir -p $OUT

echo "[*] Step 1: URL Collection"
waybackurls $TARGET | sort -u > $OUT/urls.txt

echo "[*] Step 2: SQLi Parameters"
cat $OUT/urls.txt | gf sqli > $OUT/sqli_params.txt

echo "[*] Step 3: SQLMap Testing"
while read url; do
  sqlmap -u "$url" --batch --level=3 --risk=2 --output-dir=$OUT/sqlmap/ 2>/dev/null
done < $OUT/sqli_params.txt

echo "[*] Step 4: Results"
find $OUT/sqlmap/ -name '*.txt' -exec grep -l 'injectable' {} \;

echo "[+] SQLi scan complete!"
python:
import subprocess, sys, os
target = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else 'example.com'
out = f'sqli_{target}'
os.makedirs(out, exist_ok=True)

subprocess.run(f'waybackurls {target} | sort -u > {out}/urls.txt', shell=True)
subprocess.run(f'cat {out}/urls.txt | gf sqli > {out}/sqli_params.txt', shell=True)

with open(f'{out}/sqli_params.txt') as f:
    for url in f:
        url = url.strip()
        if url:
            subprocess.run(f'sqlmap -u "{url}" --batch --level=3 --output-dir={out}/sqlmap/', shell=True)

print(f'[+] Done! Check {out}/sqlmap/')

name: API Security Scanner
description: Discover and test API endpoints for security misconfigurations
bash:
#!/bin/bash
# API Security Scanner
TARGET=$1
OUT="api_$TARGET"
mkdir -p $OUT

echo "[*] Step 1: API Discovery"
kr brute $TARGET -w /usr/share/wordlists/api_routes.txt -o json > $OUT/endpoints.json

echo "[*] Step 2: Swagger Detection"
for path in /swagger.json /openapi.json /api-docs /swagger-ui.html /v1/swagger.json /v2/swagger.json; do
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' "https://$TARGET$path")
  if [ "$code" != "404" ]; then
    echo "  [+] Found: $path (HTTP $code)"
  fi
done

echo "[*] Step 3: Auth Testing"
curl -s "https://$TARGET/api/v1/users" -H 'Authorization: ' | head -20

echo "[*] Step 4: Rate Limiting"
for i in $(seq 1 100); do
  curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}\n' "https://$TARGET/api/v1/login" -d 'user=test&pass=test'
done | sort | uniq -c

echo "[+] API scan complete!"
python:
import requests, json, sys

target = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else 'example.com'
print(f'[*] Scanning API: {target}')

# Swagger detection
swagger_paths = ['/swagger.json','/openapi.json','/api-docs','/swagger-ui.html']
for path in swagger_paths:
    try:
        r = requests.get(f'https://{target}{path}', timeout=5)
        if r.status_code != 404:
            print(f'  [+] {path} -> {r.status_code}')
    except: pass

# Rate limit test
print('[*] Testing rate limiting...')
codes = []
for i in range(20):
    try:
        r = requests.get(f'https://{target}/api/v1/user', timeout=3)
        codes.append(r.status_code)
    except: pass
print(f'  Responses: {dict((x, codes.count(x)) for x in set(codes))}')
print('[+] Done!')

name: Cloud Security Audit
description: Audit cloud infrastructure for misconfigurations and exposed assets
bash:
#!/bin/bash
# Cloud Security Audit
TARGET=$1
OUT="cloud_$TARGET"
mkdir -p $OUT

echo "[*] Step 1: S3 Bucket Enumeration"
for word in assets backup data dev files media prod staging static uploads; do
  for bucket in $TARGET-$word $word-$TARGET ${TARGET}${word}; do
    code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' "https://$bucket.s3.amazonaws.com")
    if [ "$code" != "404" ] && [ "$code" != "000" ]; then
      echo "  [+] S3: $bucket (HTTP $code)" | tee -a $OUT/s3.txt
    fi
  done
done

echo "[*] Step 2: Azure Blob Storage"
for word in assets backup data; do
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' "https://${TARGET}${word}.blob.core.windows.net")
  if [ "$code" != "400" ]; then
    echo "  [+] Azure: ${TARGET}${word} (HTTP $code)"
  fi
done

echo "[*] Step 3: Config Exposure"
for file in .env .git/config .aws/credentials wp-config.php config.yml; do
  code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' "https://$TARGET/$file")
  if [ "$code" = "200" ]; then
    echo "  [+] EXPOSED: /$file" | tee -a $OUT/exposed.txt
  fi
done

echo "[+] Cloud audit complete!"
